name: Caddy's Delight Virtual Golf Lounge
about: Caddy's Delight Virtual Golf Lounge offers an indoor golf experience with a focus on social and entertainment aspects. The facility provides virtual golf bays where players can play on various courses, coupled with a full bar and grill serving fresh, locally sourced food and a wide selection of craft beers. It caters to both casual golfers looking for a fun outing and groups seeking event hosting options, with private events available. The venue emphasizes a laid-back atmosphere where golfers can socialize and enjoy food and drinks after their virtual round.
why_golfers_like_it: Social atmosphere with food and drinks available on-site
Variety of craft beers and local food options
Indoor 18-hole miniature golf course in addition to virtual bays
Casual environment perfect for relaxed outings

food_and_drink.notes: 30 brews on tap, plus canned beers and cocktails

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own washed clubs or rent a set for $22 per session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full bar and grill with fresh, locally sourced food and craft beers, but external food/drink policies are not explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to complete 18 virtual holes is not specified, but the venue offers hourly bay rentals starting at $45.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as 'fun for all ages' and features an indoor 18-hole miniature golf course.
